title: Roasted Charred Middle Eastern Lamb Kebabs
description: A flavorful and healthy Middle Eastern dish featuring charred lamb kebabs, served with white sauerkraut and a side of rest, perfect for a low-calorie meal
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, cumin, paprika, salt, and black pepper
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper
Roast the lamb kebabs in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until charred and cooked through
While the lamb is cooking, heat the white sauerkraut in a saucepan over medium heat
Serve the lamb kebabs with the heated sauerkraut and a side of rest
Garnish with fresh parsley or cilantro, if desired
